use_cases: Showcase tech stack on a developer portfolio landing page
Add interactive visual interest to SaaS product pages
Create engaging hero section animations for dev-tool websites
Display technology stack as animated cursor trail effect
Enhance portfolio or personal website with tech icon animations
ai_summary: A custom cursor effect that renders tech stack icons (JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, HTML, CSS) as animated particles following the mouse cursor on an HTML5 canvas. Creates an engaging visual trail of technology icons that users interact with by moving their cursor across the page.
